synopsis: Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes is a Star Wars Legends game for PC, Xbox 360, PlayStation 3, Wii, PlayStation 2, PlayStation Portable, and Nintendo DS. It was developed by Krome Studios and was first announced to be released on September 15, 2009 but was then pushed back to October 6. It is based upon the Star Wars: The Clone Wars movie and TV series and is set between Season 1 and Season 2.
title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes
